title: ficus indica var. gelderi
intro: Ficus indica var. gelderi, also known as the Indian banyan or Ficus benghalensis, is a type of deciduous tree native to the Indian subcontinent and Southeast Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Ficus indica var. gelderi include reducing fever, treating diarrhea and dysentery, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Ficus indica var. gelderi is traditionally used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
